title: M5 — Risk controls + reconciliation + live loop
source: hackathon-pm M0 bootstrap 2026-05-28; roadmap in plan eres-un-product-manager-bubbly-floyd.md
why: Pre-trade gates + kill-switch are mandatory before any capital (even paper). Reconciliation to broker truth makes the loop crash-safe (no double-trade). The live_loop wires it all together.
value_rationale: Critical path to live paper-trading for the AI Engine Quantitative Hack; H = directly gates competition participation.
scope: execution/risk.py: per-asset/gross/net notional caps, margin floor, DD breaker, daily-loss kill-switch state machine
execution/live_loop.py: reconcile -> per-card decide -> size -> risk check -> place -> persist

history.reason: Delivered via the survival book: execution/risk path (apply_risk_controls: per-asset/gross caps, DD breaker latch, daily-loss kill) + reconcile.py (broker-truth, idempotent) + live_loop.py (reconcile->decide->size->risk->place->persist). Hardened further today by B0094 (position-aware leverage gate) + B0095 (intraday daily-loss kill).
